_comment: Single source of truth for the YouTube video references shown on each kata. Edit this file to add or change videos — no code changes needed. Each key under `videos` is a kataId (must match an id in src/data/katas); its value is an array of { label, url, steps? } links. `url` may be any YouTube form (https://youtu.be/ID, https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ID, or an embed URL) — the YouTubeEmbed component extracts the id. `label` is the caption shown above the player. `steps` is optional: it maps a step number (string key) to a timestamp within that video (e.g. "steps": { "2": "0:14", "8": "1:47" }), and the step page deep-links the embed to that moment when viewing the matching step; steps without an entry fall back to the step's own videoTimestamp. Links placed in `_unassigned` are NOT rendered; they are parked here so they are not lost, waiting to be moved into the correct kata key above.

_unassigned.label: Reference video
_unassigned._note: Kata not yet identified (YouTube is blocked by this environment's network policy, so the title could not be read). Move this object into the matching kataId array under `videos`.
